identity.name: 135 St Clair Ave W
identity.address: 135 St Clair Ave W, Toronto, ON (SE corner St Clair & Avenue Rd)

narrative.summary: Fitzrovia's first project from their $1B DevCore Fund. Replaces a 14-storey mid-century office building (Ontario Ministry of Environment). 100-year lease structure — 'rent to build rentals.' 631 purpose-built rental units with childcare. Locals in the affluent Avenue & St Clair area are strongly opposed, calling it a 'giant monolith' that threatens neighbourhood character. Designed by the prestigious Hariri Pontarini Architects.

development.status: Proposal filed, facing strong local opposition

keyDates.label: Proposal filed
keyDates.note: 49-storey rental tower replacing 1964 provincial office building

keyDates.label: Local opposition peaks
keyDates.note: Residents call it a 'giant monolith' and 'monstrosity'

development.transitContext: Streetcar + subway access via St Clair corridor.
